text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is staring into a snack packet with a
torn look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Just one wouldn't hurt, right? But then
again, I don't want any breakouts.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, I told Creek about how my skin's been
acting up, and she said I should cut down on all
the greasy food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But it's so hard to resist when the snacks are right
there in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No more carrot snacks for me. I guess I'll stick to spinach cookies instead...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not willing to risk a breakout, Oguri Cap seems
somewhat disheartened now that she can't enjoy
her favorite foods.
